meaning: <美>匡西特活动房屋(一种用预制构件搭成的长拱形活动房屋)
examples: I locked the door to the Quonset hut.
We sat in the Quonset hut, surrounded by what angels I had finished, drinking coffee.
Each site had a Quonset hut on site where building equipment was stored during construction.
Rick Suhr has connected two steel Quonset huts, one with a long, narrow tunnel measuring 100 feet for the run-up.
About 12 hours before "Little Boy" was placed aboard the aircraft Enola Gay, a scientist appeared at a Quonset hut on the island of Tinian to make final adjustments.
